transitions.reason: Apply Decision #135 and publish the strict ArtifactStaleReason contract for Artifact and NodeRun projections.

components.schemas.Artifact.stale_reason: no backward-compatible schema branch remains
components.schemas.NodeRun.stale_reason: no backward-compatible schema branch remains

transitions.reason: Remove private Context, locked layer, and output Schema metadata from the teacher-facing Prompt Preview contract while retaining it in the server-side PromptSnapshot.
